categories.green_definition: Psionic reproduces the current FineWeb shard contract, fixed validation split, exact val_loss, and exact val_bpb accounting against frozen challenge fixtures.
categories.current_repo_truth: psionic-data now owns the shard ABI, validation token loader, SentencePiece byte-accounting LUT oracle, a committed parity fixture, and a frozen test that matches the current train_gpt.py and train_gpt_mlx.py reference paths for shard loading, validation slicing, val_loss, and val_bpb.
categories.boundary_note: Do not claim comparable Parameter Golf scores until this category is green.

categories.green_definition: A Psionic-owned baseline decoder can train, validate, export, reload, and re-evaluate on a single device while matching the public baseline architecture and optimizer behavior.
categories.current_repo_truth: No compact challenge decoder family, Muon parity, or single-device reference trainer exists yet in psionic-models or psionic-train.
categories.boundary_note: A promising architecture sketch or one-off local run is not enough.

categories.green_definition: Psionic has one explicit 8xH100 execution path with topology, timing, memory, and artifact receipts that support the declared challenge bar.
categories.current_repo_truth: No benchmark package, no distributed 8xH100 trainer lane, and no widened CUDA training surface are landed for Parameter Golf yet.
categories.boundary_note: Do not infer 8xH100 closure from local or reference-emulated distributed helpers.

categories.green_definition: Psionic can emit one self-contained submission folder with explicit artifact-byte accounting, runnable entrypoint shape, record metadata, and preserved receipts.
categories.current_repo_truth: Claim language and accounting posture are now explicit in docs/PARAMETER_GOLF_ACCOUNTING.md, but no runnable submission wrapper, submission.json generator, README generator, or record-folder output contract is landed yet.
categories.boundary_note: This category is only green at the governance level today; the actual package is still missing.

categories.green_definition: Psionic can defend a record-track submission under the published challenge rules, including counted code, self-contained evaluation, and reproducible 8xH100 execution.
categories.current_repo_truth: The public challenge language still centers train_gpt.py and counted script bytes, while Psionic has not yet landed either the technical lane or the final counted-runtime story.
categories.boundary_note: Treat this as blocked by both in-repo implementation work and the need for an explicit public accounting interpretation.
